# Galerie Louis Barrand

## About
Galerie Louis Barrand is an art gallery based in France, specializing in modern and contemporary art.

## Content
- Artists: Biographies and portfolios of represented artists
- Works: Paintings, sculptures, and other artworks with detailed descriptions
- Exhibitions: Current and past exhibitions with dates and descriptions
- Press: Press articles and media coverage
- About: Gallery history, Marcus Prize, and practical information
- Contact: Inquiry form for appointments and information

## Site Structure
- /artistes - Artist listings and individual profiles
- /oeuvres - Artwork catalog with thematic navigation
- /expositions - Exhibition listings and details
- /a-propos - About the gallery
- /presse - Press section
- /contact - Contact form
